message:
chore(beads,deps): update issue tracker; add fcp-async-core dep to vectordb connector

- .beads/issues.jsonl: Close flywheel_connectors-10r4k (was_bounded false
  positive fix) and flywheel_connectors-1380g (degraded mode test bug).
  Update timestamps on existing issues.

- connectors/vectordb/Cargo.toml: Add fcp-async-core as a dependency,
  required for the JSONL IPC protocol loop's async handler execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
